历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics category was approximately 8696 → 8086 → 7635 → 10372 → 9448, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (physics and chemistry binding), the ranking significantly dropped to 10372, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 9448, with a fluctuation range of about 900 places in the past two years, and a baseline of about 9448 in 2025; the enrollment plan for Physics category in Hubei Province was 19 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 21 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 30, an increase of about 42.9% compared to 2025, the largest increase in the past six years, significantly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; Shandong University (Weihai) is a campus of Shandong University, ranking approximately 22nd on the Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in recent years and strong comprehensive strength; Shandong University's reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative (legacy public opinion from the 2019 study partner incident), but Shandong University (Weihai) as an independent campus is less affected; Douyin popularity ranks 20th overall (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, attracting considerable application attention; Shandong University has Mathematics A+ (corresponding to Mathematics enrollment major), Chinese Language and Literature A (corresponding to Chinese Language and Literature category), Foreign Languages and Literature A (corresponding to Foreign Languages and Literature category), Control Science and Engineering A (corresponding to Automation category), and Applied Economics A- (corresponding to Economics category), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electronic Information, Mathematics, and Automation continue to have high social popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics category examinees in Hubei Province is approximately 252,600, a slight increase of about 1.1% compared to 249,802 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Shandong Province, which is an inter-provincial application for Hubei examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 9448, a significant enrollment expansion of about 42.9% in 2026 (significantly alleviating competition), a slight increase in Physics category examinees (about 1.1%), persistently high popularity of engineering majors, and high Douyin exposure, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics category in 2026 will significantly drop compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11678, with a range of 11178–12178.

Note that in 2026, most subject selection requirements are 'Physics + Chemistry', so confirm eligibility when applying.
